steps.title: Place the hoards on the timeline
steps.content: Swords first developed in Britain during the Middle Bronze Age, around the 14th to 10th centuries BCE. The Llanarmon-yn-Iâl hoard is earlier, from the 16th century BCE, while the Horsehope Craig hoard is later, from the 7th century BCE.

steps.title: Apply the sword timeline
steps.content: Choice A wrongly claims sword evidence in both hoards. Choice B focuses on discovery dates, which do not matter. Choice C puts sword evidence in the earlier hoard, reversing the timeline. The logical contrast is evidence in the later hoard but not in the earlier one. The answer is D.
